title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by navigating to Settings > Security > Reset Password.

title: Create Account
content: Users can create an account by clicking Sign Up and completing the registration form.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Settings > Privacy.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support through the help center or email support@example.com.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within five to seven business days after approval.

title: Change Email
content: Users can change their email address from the profile settings page.

title: Update Profile
content: Users can update profile details such as name, phone number, and profile picture.

title: Enable Two Factor Authentication
content: Two factor authentication can be enabled from the security settings.

title: Disable Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can disable two factor authentication from the security settings.

title: Verify Email
content: Users must verify their email address to activate their account.

title: Subscription Plans
content: Users can view subscription plans from the billing section.

title: Upgrade Plan
content: Users can upgrade their subscription plan from the billing dashboard.

title: Downgrade Plan
content: Users can downgrade their subscription from the billing settings.

title: Cancel Subscription
content: Users can cancel their subscription anytime from the billing page.

title: Payment Methods
content: Users can add or remove payment methods in billing settings.

title: Invoice Download
content: Invoices can be downloaded from the billing history section.

title: Billing Cycle
content: Billing cycles can be monthly or yearly depending on the selected plan.

title: Auto Renewal
content: Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of the billing cycle.

title: Payment Failure
content: Users will receive a notification if a payment attempt fails.

title: Free Trial
content: New users may receive a free trial depending on the subscription plan.

title: Upload Files
content: Users can upload files using the upload option in the dashboard.

title: Delete Files
content: Users can delete files from the file manager.

title: File Sharing
content: Files can be shared using secure share links.

title: File Size Limit
content: Maximum upload file size is 100MB.

title: Supported File Formats
content: Supported file formats include PDF, DOCX, PNG, and JPG.

title: Workspace Creation
content: Users can create workspaces to collaborate with team members.

title: Invite Team Members
content: Admins can invite team members using email invitations.

title: Remove Team Members
content: Admins can remove members from workspace settings.

title: User Roles
content: Roles include Admin, Editor, and Viewer.

title: Workspace Settings
content: Workspace settings allow administrators to configure permissions.

title: Notifications
content: Users receive notifications about important account activities.

title: Email Notifications
content: Email notifications can be enabled or disabled in settings.

title: Push Notifications
content: Mobile push notifications can be enabled in app settings.

title: Notification Preferences
content: Users can customize notification preferences.

title: Mute Notifications
content: Notifications can be muted temporarily.

title: Data Export
content: Users can export data in CSV or JSON format.

title: Data Backup
content: Regular backups are performed to protect user data.

title: Data Privacy
content: User data is protected according to the privacy policy.

title: GDPR Compliance
content: The platform complies with GDPR regulations.

title: Delete Personal Data
content: Users can request deletion of personal data.

title: Dashboard Overview
content: The dashboard provides an overview of user activity and statistics.

title: Analytics Reports
content: Analytics reports provide insights into usage patterns.

title: Usage Statistics
content: Usage statistics track user engagement with platform features.

title: Activity Logs
content: Activity logs track user actions in the system.

title: Audit Logs
content: Audit logs are available for monitoring security events.

title: Mobile Application
content: The platform provides mobile applications for Android and iOS.

title: Android App
content: The Android application can be downloaded from Google Play.

title: iOS App
content: The iOS application can be downloaded from the App Store.

title: Mobile Notifications
content: Push notifications are supported on mobile apps.

title: Offline Access
content: Some features are available in offline mode.

title: API Access
content: Developers can interact with the platform using REST APIs.

title: API Keys
content: API keys are required to authenticate API requests.

title: API Rate Limits
content: API requests are limited by rate limits.

title: Webhooks
content: Webhooks allow real-time event notifications.

title: Developer Documentation
content: Developers can access documentation in the developer portal.

title: Search Feature
content: Users can search documents using the search bar.

title: Advanced Search
content: Advanced search allows filtering results using multiple criteria.

title: Search Suggestions
content: Search suggestions appear while typing.

title: Search History
content: Users can view previous search queries.

title: Search Filters
content: Filters help refine search results.

title: Security Policy
content: Security policies protect user data and system integrity.

title: Encryption
content: All data is encrypted during transmission.

title: Account Lock
content: Accounts may be locked after multiple failed login attempts.

title: Login Alerts
content: Users receive alerts for suspicious login activity.

title: Password Requirements
content: Passwords must contain at least eight characters.

title: Session Timeout
content: User sessions expire after a period of inactivity.

title: Logout
content: Users can log out from the account menu.

title: Multiple Device Login
content: Users can log in from multiple devices.

title: Device Management
content: Users can manage trusted devices from settings.

title: Login History
content: Login history shows recent account access events.

title: Support Tickets
content: Users can create support tickets through the help center.

title: Ticket Status
content: Users can track ticket status from the support dashboard.

title: Live Chat Support
content: Live chat support is available during business hours.

title: Community Forum
content: Users can discuss issues in the community forum.

title: Knowledge Base
content: The knowledge base contains helpful documentation.

title: System Maintenance
content: Scheduled maintenance may temporarily interrupt services.

title: Service Status
content: Users can check system status on the status page.

title: Incident Reports
content: Incident reports explain service disruptions.

title: Downtime Notifications
content: Users are notified about planned downtime.

title: Backup Servers
content: Backup servers ensure service availability.

title: Integration Support
content: The platform supports integrations with third-party tools.

title: Slack Integration
content: Users can connect their account with Slack.

title: Google Drive Integration
content: Files can be synced with Google Drive.

title: Zapier Integration
content: Automation workflows can be created with Zapier.

title: Webhook Triggers
content: Webhooks trigger external automation.
